hero.headline: I design interfaces for the AI era
hero.tagline: Designing for AI means absorbing friction, latency and the unpredictable — and turning them into reliable experiences.

presentationHero.headline: I design interfaces for AI.
presentationHero.tagline: The orchestrator is the new designer. I design the workflows that make AI systems reason, from agent mapping to the interface that drives them.

pitchPlayground.title: Designing for AI is a different craft.
pitchPlayground.body: AI interfaces don't respond — they reason, hesitate, err and self-correct. Designing for them means architecting uncertainty as much as screens.

playground.title: What AI design challenge concerns you?
playground.subtitle: Pick a challenge, adjust creativity.
playground.ctaPostInteraction: Want to design a similar agent UI? Let's talk

about.title: 19 years of design, an AI speciality
about.bio: UX/UI expert certified in AI project management, I design interfaces that hold up against model unpredictability — from discovery to production. I integrate automation and prompt engineering directly into my workflow.

contact.title: An AI project in mind?
contact.subtitle: Freelance · Full-time · Consulting — AI Design focused
